## Lite

- typed KV `register_key` / `unregister_key`, optional editor color hints; `register_editor_hint`, `get_editor_hints_copy`
- `mark_dirty()` debounced autosave; `set_schema_migrations`; JSON export helpers
- `SaveComponent`, `CollectionLink`, `SaveStatePickupVacuum`
- `export_current_to_slot` / `import_slot_into_runtime`
- Save Browser: color picker / swatch + click-to-edit popup, collapsible raw preview, icon toolbar, Config layout, `SaveStateUnixDisplay`; hints file `.savestate_editor_hints.json`
- `save_menu_lite.tscn`; `plugin.cfg` Godot 4.3–4.6 note

## Pro

- [SaveState Pro on itch.io](https://chuumberry.itch.io/savestate-pro) — `persist_async`, Save Browser Export JSON + folder
- `templates/save_menu_pro.tscn` multi-slot UI (thumbs, confirm delete, backdrop input block)
